BackstoryDef.title: Vault 19 gang leader
BackstoryDef.description: After escaping NCRCF, [PAWN_nameDef] organized a disciplined gang at Vault 19. Unlike other Powder Gangers, [PAWN_pronoun] believes in structure and vision, seeing [PAWN_possessive] gang as the foundation of something greater.

BackstoryDef.title: NCRCF gang boss
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] seized control of NCRCF after the prison riot, ruling through intimidation and brutal enforcement. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps the prison as [PAWN_possessive] stronghold, extracting tribute from those who pass through [PAWN_possessive] territory.

BackstoryDef.title: disgraced sheriff
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as sheriff of Primm until [PAWN_possessive] brutal methods crossed the line. Imprisoned at NCRCF for manslaughter, [PAWN_pronoun] believes [PAWN_pronoun] did what was necessary to keep order.

BackstoryDef.title: powder ganger raider
BackstoryDef.description: After escaping NCRCF, [PAWN_nameDef] formed a raiding group targeting poorly defended settlements. [PAWN_pronoun] led the assault on Goodsprings, seeing easy prey in isolated frontier towns.

BackstoryDef.title: Legion-crippled ganger
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] rode with the Powder Gangers until Caesar's Legion crucified [PAWN_possessive] gang in Nipton. [PAWN_pronoun] was the only survivor, left alive but crippled as a warning. Now [PAWN_pronoun] lives on chems and bitterness.

BackstoryDef.title: Vault 19 lieutenant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as Samuel Cooke's second-in-command at Vault 19. [PAWN_pronoun] handles the day-to-day operations of the gang, managing supplies and coordinating their activities.

BackstoryDef.title: prison gate guard
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] stands watch at the entrance to NCRCF, checking visitors and watching for NCR patrols. [PAWN_pronoun] knows everyone who comes and goes from the prison.

BackstoryDef.title: cell block guard
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] patrols the cell blocks at NCRCF, keeping the other prisoners in line and enforcing Eddie's rules. [PAWN_pronoun] enjoys having authority over those weaker than [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: prison yard overseer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] manages the prison yard at NCRCF, overseeing supplies, coordinating work details, and ensuring Eddie's orders are carried out. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps the gang's operations running smoothly.

BackstoryDef.title: Eddie's enforcer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] serves as Eddie's personal enforcer at NCRCF, delivering beatings and worse to anyone who steps out of line. [PAWN_pronoun] takes savage pleasure in violence.

BackstoryDef.title: Vault 19 technician
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] maintains the aging systems at Vault 19 for Samuel Cooke's gang. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps the generators running, the doors working, and repairs whatever equipment the gang salvages.
